\tzpentry{ID4484}{Breathing Normalform Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4484 introduces Breathing Normalform Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \label{eq:breathing-normalform} \dot{A} = \big(\sigma(\Lambda) + i\omega_{\mathrm{eff}}\big) A - \beta\,|A|^2 A + \mathcal{O}\big(|A|^4\big), \end{equation}
